summary: Iteration-4 complete trivia testing (backend + frontend). Backend: 12/12 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_trivia.py covering admin CRUD (list seeded 82, stats, auth-required, create+update+toggle+delete, validation), trivia player flow (start needs auth, returns 10 questions with public payload that strips correct_index/explanation, full 10-question scoring flow with 5 correct fast + 5 wrong = 75 pts and session_finished=true on last, timeout chosen_index=-1 path, already-answered 400, my-stats, leaderboard, invalid-session 404). Frontend Playwright (3 runs): (1) UNAUTH home shows data-testid=home-trivia-card and CTA data-testid=home-trivia-cta-login with href=/login; visiting /trivia unauth redirects to /login. (2) AUTHED (token injected via /api/auth/register then localStorage): home-trivia-cta visible with href=/trivia, login-CTA hidden; /trivia shows trivia-intro + trivia-start-btn; clicking start opens play screen with trivia-timer (Arabic 'ث' seconds), trivia-question-text, trivia-choice-0..3, trivia-submit-btn. After submit, trivia-reveal banner + trivia-next-btn appear. Completed all 10 questions: trivia-finished + trivia-final-score=15 + trivia-play-again-btn rendered (1 correct fast x 15 = expected). (3) ADMIN login Rashed550011/Rr@123123 succeeds, admin-tab-trivia visible, 82 trivia-row-<id> rows rendered, trivia-admin-add-btn present, per-row trivia-edit-<id>/trivia-toggle-<id>/trivia-delete-<id> all present, trivia-edit-dialog opens for both add and edit with trivia-edit-question-ar/_en, trivia-edit-choice-ar-0..3 / -en-0..3, trivia-edit-correct-0, trivia-edit-save-btn. Stats card shows 82 total / 82 active / 49 attempts / 11 sessions.
critical_code_review_comments: trivia_routes.py _to_public correctly strips correct_index, explanation, explanation_ar before sending to player — secure pattern.
Scoring (10 pts + 5 pts if time_taken_ms < 10000) implemented server-side; client cannot inflate score because chosen_index is validated against stored correct_index.
admin_list_questions returns key 'questions' (consistent with review_request note); pagination uses limit=1000 default. For very large banks consider real pagination.
Auto-seed on startup is idempotent (count check) — safe.
Trivia router file is single ~360-line module — within size limits, no refactor needed.
POST /api/trivia/answer prevents duplicate answers on the same question via ALREADY_ANSWERED 400 and prevents submitting against a finished session — verified.
Public question payload retains image_url and composition_images so 'image_face / image_jersey / image_trophy' UI types render the asset to the user — good.
Frontend Trivia.jsx data-testids match the spec exactly. Header reveals nav link only to logged-in users. Home CTA toggles between -cta-login and -cta correctly.
Admin TriviaTab + TriviaEditDialog render all expected data-testids including per-row toggle/edit/delete and dialog choice/correct radios.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 16 review_request frontend checkpoints verified — home banner authed+unauth, /trivia auth gate, intro screen, play screen with timer/question/4 choices/submit, reveal, next, finished+score+play-again, admin tab with 82 rows + add/edit/toggle/delete + dialog with all fields)

test_credentials: Admin: Rashed550011 / Rr@123123 (verified). Fresh user registered via API per-run: trvfe<rand> / pass1234.
seed_data_creation: Test users via /api/auth/register left in DB (TEST_TRV_*, TEST_FE_*) — harmless and clearly prefixed. No persistent trivia questions added (test_admin_create_update_toggle_delete deletes its created question).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trivia feature is end-to-end working. To re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4_trivia.py -v. Frontend: register via API + inject ncc_token/ncc_user into localStorage to bypass the login form (employee_id input selector differs between Arabic and EN). 82 seed questions confirmed in DB via /api/admin/trivia/questions. Trivia testids namespace 'trivia-*' is consistent. Time-out submit via chosen_index=-1 works; backend treats as wrong with 0 points.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All review_request items pass.
